textSections.content: SSC One Time Registration : SSC has started one-time registration on its new website SSC.GOV.IN. Candidate Can Apply Between 05 June 2025 to 26 June 2025. | SSC Live Photo : SSC has made a big change in the application process. Now the photo of the candidate will be uploaded live, that too through webcam or through the official MySSC App. The candidate has to take care that he looks straight ahead in the photo and the background should also be light/white. | Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in SSC Apply Online for Junior / Senior Translator Recruitment 2025. | Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. | Kindl
